name: Cohere Rerank
pricing_notes: Free tier: 100 calls/mo; Rerank-3: $2/1K queries (up to 100 documents); volume discounts

auth.notes: COHERE_API_KEY; same key as Cohere embed/generate

performance.notes: Rerank-3 latency 200-500ms for 100 documents; scales with document count

agent_readiness.notes: Best-in-class reranking API. Rerank-3 model: query + documents → relevance scores. Supports 100+ languages. Multi-field input support. Integrates directly into LangChain/LlamaIndex RAG pipelines. Simple API: one endpoint, query + docs → ranked docs.

gotchas: Cost adds up with many RAG queries at scale
Free tier (100 calls/mo) insufficient for development
Response only contains scores, not generated text
Document count per call limited (100 default, 500 max)
best_when: RAG pipelines where retrieval precision matters (reranking improves top-k accuracy)
Agents that retrieve many candidates and need to select the most relevant
LangChain/LlamaIndex pipelines adding a reranking step after vector search
avoid_when: Simple RAG with small document sets where reranking isn't cost-justified
Extremely high query volumes where cost becomes prohibitive
summary: Cohere Rerank is the market-leading reranking API for RAG pipelines. Rerank-3 model provides relevance scoring across 100+ languages with simple query+documents → ranked results API. Dramatically improves RAG precision vs pure vector similarity. Direct LangChain/LlamaIndex integrations. Best-in-class quality for a critical but often overlooked RAG component.
